description: Verify Bridge Theorem: delta_TC = -delta_S_ent under UV stability. Exact identity: delta_TC + delta_S_ent = delta(sum_S_i). Bridge holds when delta(sum_S_i) is negligible (UV stable). Reports r_bridge (correlation of delta_TC with -delta_S_ent) and UV residual ratio (how much sum_S_i changes relative to signal).
